title: Vanillative
body:
# Vanillative
* Ambience that makes your world that much more alive, and QoL that *just makes sense*.
  * Versions 1 up to 1.2 includes [Terralith](https://modrinth.com/datapack/terralith) and [Nullscape](https://modrinth.com/datapack/nullscape), with no nether modficiations;
  * Version 1.3 is meant for forever worlds: it removes all Worldgen changes, and you can safely remove Vanillative from a 1.3 world and upgrade to vanilla.
* Is fully compatible with Vanilla; Vanilla clients can connect to Vanillative servers, and vice versa.
* Based on [Additive](https://modrinth.com/modpack/additive), which means better-than-OptiFine features and performance.
* Features [World Host](https://modrinth.com/mod/world-host) and [Plasmo Voice](https://modrinth.com/plugin/plasmo-voice) for easy multiplayer and voice chats.
  * Note World Host is not yet available for 1.21.8.
* Contains no data-pack-y features.

**TL;DR:** it is not really about what Vanillative *is* doing, it's more about what it's *not* doing: interfering with your gameplay. Vanillative only includes QoL features to make it the easiest it can possibly be for you to run your own server with friends.

*Special thanks to [Devin](https://modrinth.com/user/devin) for maintaining Additive, and to [Lukebemish](https://modrinth.com/user/lukebemish) for helping me figure out the Modrinth API.*
